title: Moor Door
description: A mod that adds 3 block tall doors to minecraft.
body:
# Moor Door (More Door)

**TLDR:** 3 BLOCK TALL DOORS!

Do you like building large, grand doors to your castles in Minecraft? If so, the Moor Door (More Door) mod is for you!

This mod is a simple mod to add 3-block tall doors to Minecraft. Currently, there are the three block tall **steel** and **paperbark** doors.

Moor Door is survival friendly! You can craft the door you want in a regular crafting table using a two block tall door and two ingots/planks of that door.

Steel Door --> Iron Door + 2 Iron Ingots

## Future Mod Versions
Future versions will have more door types, including the triple height versions of the vanilla door variants.

## Issues and Contributing

All contributions are welcome on GitHub. To report a bug, please use the GitHub issue tracker.
